experiences.title: ROSS — AI Robot Companion for Elderly Care
experiences.context: H-HACK, H-Farm Robotics Hackathon → H-Farm Venture Building Program
experiences.one_line_description: AI-powered robot companion that slows cognitive decline in elderly patients through adaptive stimulation personalised on a biographical knowledge base. Selected top project at H-HACK, now in H-Farm venture building with patent application in progress.
experiences.ai_relevance: FLAGSHIP — full AI-native product: personalised knowledge base, adaptive stimulation system, robotics + AI

experiences.title: MANTA AI — RAG Voice Agent for Aerospace
experiences.context: Impact Puglia Challenge — H-Farm College x Università di Puglia
experiences.one_line_description: Led cross-university team of 4 to build a functional RAG-based AI voice agent enabling MANTA Group (Leonardo & Boeing supplier) to query 500+ pages of technical manuals via voice/text in seconds.
experiences.ai_relevance: HIGH — RAG architecture, Voiceflow, functional MVP shipped in 1-month sprint

raw_inputs.ref: CV page 2, Projects section, MANTA AI

experiences.title: Agromercato.com — WhatsApp AI Agent for B2B Food Market
experiences.context: H-Farm Startup Centre Pre-Acceleration Program (partnered with Abilita Srls)
experiences.one_line_description: Designed and validated a WhatsApp AI agent centralising wholesale food orders, as part of a B2B marketplace strategy for a €150M+ turnover pilot market. WhatsApp chosen based on primary research confirming it as dominant channel on both sides.
experiences.ai_relevance: HIGH — AI agent design, channel validation, market-grounded product decision
